params.name: Voyager 1
params.source: Wish Box, Lottery Machine (0.09%), Wishing (0.07%), Murikan Treasure Maps (0.01%), Grandmaster Scrolls (0.81%), Relic Forge (120 Relic RF)
params.description:
On Mar 16, 2013 AD, Voyager 1 arrived at the heliopause and was ready to enter space. Forty years ago, Voyager 1 was launced into the universe. Its battery ensures it will continue for a few more years. Once the battery depletes, it will continue towards the centre of the galaxy and never return.

[Basic Info]

Launch location: Cape Canaveral, Floridar launch base

Launch vehicle: Titan III E Centaur rocket

Destination planet: Jupiter, Saturn, outer solar system

Power consumption: 420 watts
